title: Fixing the Incorrect Greatest Common Divisor

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input two integers a and b separated by space
statement.outputFormat: Return the greatest common divisor of a and b

hints.text: Check if a number is prime or not

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.intuition: Use the Euclidean algorithm to find the GCD
editorial.bruteForce: Calculate all factors of both numbers
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the Euclidean algorithm with memoization

functionSignature.java: public int gcd(int a, int b);
